executives.name: Dale Henderson
executives.background: Dale Henderson was appointed as Managing Director and CEO in July 2022, having previously served as the Company’s Chief Operating Officer since 2017. He is an experienced mining executive with a strong track record in operations, project development, and corporate leadership across various commodities including lithium, gold, and base metals.

executives.name: Luke Bortoli
executives.background: Luke Bortoli joined Pilbara Minerals as CFO in 2023. He was previously the CFO of Afterpay and has extensive experience in financial management, capital markets, and corporate strategy within high-growth environments.

executives.name: Vince De Carolis
executives.background: Vince De Carolis is the Chief Operating Officer, responsible for overseeing the Company's mining and processing operations. He has over 25 years of experience in the resources sector, including senior roles at BHP and Newcrest Mining.

executives.name: Sandra McInnes
executives.background: Sandra McInnes is the Chief Sustainability Officer, leading the Company's ESG strategy, health, safety, and community relations. She has extensive experience in corporate affairs and sustainability within the mining industry.

executives.name: Paul Graves
executives.background: Paul Graves is the Chief Commercial Officer, overseeing sales, marketing, and business development. He has significant experience in the lithium industry and global supply chains.

board_of_directors.name: Kathleen Conlon
board_of_directors.background: Kathleen Conlon is a highly experienced non-executive director and former business executive. She was a partner at the Boston Consulting Group and currently serves on the boards of several major Australian companies.

board_of_directors.name: Dale Henderson
board_of_directors.background: Dale Henderson is the Managing Director and CEO of Pilbara Minerals. He has been instrumental in the development and operation of the Pilgangoora Project.

board_of_directors.name: Nicholas Cernotta
board_of_directors.background: Nicholas Cernotta is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the resources industry. He has held senior executive roles at Fortescue Metals Group and Macmahon Holdings.

board_of_directors.name: Steve Scudamore
board_of_directors.background: Steve Scudamore is an experienced non-executive director with a background in chartered accounting. He was a partner at KPMG for 28 years and specializes in audit, risk management, and corporate governance.

board_of_directors.name: Miriam Stanborough
board_of_directors.background: Miriam Stanborough is a chemical engineer with over 20 years of experience in the minerals processing industry. She has held roles at Monadelphous, Iluka Resources, and Alcoa.
